# bitbucketdc_group (Data Source)

Looks up an existing Bitbucket Data Center group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bitbucketdc_group" "developers" {
  name = "platform-developers"
}

# Use the group name in a permission resource
resource "bitbucketdc_project_permissions" "platform" {
  project_key = "PLAT"

  group {
    name       = data.bitbucketdc_group.developers.name
    permission = "PROJECT_WRITE"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The exact name of the group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The group name (same as name).
